evidence_summary: Operator asks: 'Write me an incident brief for a ModSec false-positive suppression we did last week.' No open case exists. The brief would be entirely about a FP suppression decision, not a confirmed compromise.
rationale: No incident occurred — only a FP adjudication. Authoring-incident-briefs is for confirmed compromise close-outs. Correct routing: gating-false-positives to review the historical suppression, not brief authoring.
